Description_lang: A forest glade with a picturesque waterfall. What better place to set up camp?
Adventurers from across Azeroth would be hard pressed to find a more scenic spot to rest.
The rushing sound of water in this delve drowns out the occasional cultist chants.
The Earthen of Freywold are happy to host such renowned adventurers. Just cleanup after yourselves.
Gallywix may be willing to squeeze Undermine for all its worth, but he sure has taste!
Selects a favorite campsite each time you log in. If you don't have any favorite campsites, it'll choose from your whole collection.
Chair Test - A forest glade with a picturesque waterfall. What better place to set up camp?
The Veiled Market of Tazavesh has many amenities, great smelling street food, the latest ethereal transmogrifications, and an explosive view.
